summary: Tested iteration 51 features: 1) Superfone completely removed from Staff Portal - only 'Call Now' button uses tel: protocol, 2) Mobile UI has larger touch targets (py-4 buttons with rounded-xl), 3) Filter buttons (All/Uncalled/Called) for leads, 4) Instagram widget on homepage with @asr_enterprises_patna profile, 5) Dashboard endpoints respond fast (<2s).
critical_code_review_comments: handleCallLead (line 177-208) correctly uses only tel: protocol - window.location.href = `tel:${lead.phone}`
No 'superfone' text found anywhere in StaffPortal.js
Mobile UI buttons use py-4 rounded-xl for larger touch targets (lines 752, 759, 766, 774)
Filter buttons implemented with grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 layout (lines 584-604)
Instagram widget added around line 1942-2050 in App.js with @asr_enterprises_patna profile
CRM dashboard uses asyncio.gather for parallel queries (routes/crm.py line 195-204)
Staff dashboard also uses asyncio.gather for parallel queries (routes/staff.py line 285-298)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Superfone completely removed. Staff Portal uses tel: protocol only for calls. Mobile UI has large touch targets. Instagram widget on homepage footer. Dashboard APIs optimized with parallel queries.

superfone_removed.details: No 'superfone' text found in StaffPortal.js. handleCallLead uses only tel: protocol.

mobile_ui_improvements.details: Buttons use py-4 rounded-xl (line 752, 759, 766, 774). Filter buttons use py-3 px-2 rounded-xl in 3-column grid.

filter_buttons.details: All/Uncalled/Called filter buttons implemented at lines 584-604. Large touch targets for mobile.

instagram_widget.details: Instagram section at line ~1942 in App.js. Links to https://instagram.com/asr_enterprises_patna. Shows placeholder posts grid and 'View All Posts on Instagram' button.

crm_dashboard_performance.details: GET /api/crm/dashboard responds in <1s. Uses asyncio.gather for parallel queries.

staff_dashboard_performance.details: GET /api/staff/{staff_id}/dashboard responds fast. Uses asyncio.gather for parallel queries.

mobile_button_classes.call_now: bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600 active:bg-blue-700 text-white py-4 rounded-xl
mobile_button_classes.whatsapp: bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 active:bg-green-700 text-white py-4 rounded-xl
mobile_button_classes.update: bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 active:bg-amber-700 text-white py-4 rounded-xl
mobile_button_classes.not_interested: bg-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-600 active:bg-gray-700 text-white py-4 rounded-xl
